title: molinia caerulea var. litoralis
intro: Moliniia caerulea var. litoralis, also known as purple moor-grass or sea purple moor-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Molinia caerulea var. litoralis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
